devdoc.details: 链上 ECVRF 验证接口（可与预编译或完整 Solidity 实现对接；address(0) 表示不在链上验证明）
仅用于本地/单元测试：不验椭圆曲线，只检查 proof 长度与 randomWord 非零。生产请用 Secp256k1Sha256TaiECVRFVerifier。

evm.assembly:
/* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
  0x80
  dup1
  0x40
  mstore
  jumpi(tag_1, callvalue)
  dataSize(sub_0)
  swap1
  dup2
  dataOffset(sub_0)
  dup3
  codecopy
  return
tag_1:
  0x00
  dup1
  revert
stop

sub_0: assembly {
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
      0x80
      dup1
      0x40
      mstore
      jumpi(tag_2, iszero(lt(calldatasize, 0x04)))
      0x00
      dup1
      revert
    tag_2:
      jumpi(tag_4, eq(0x4df90a0a, shr(0xe0, calldataload(0x00))))
      0x00
      dup1
      revert
    tag_4:
      jumpi(tag_13, callvalue)
      jumpi(tag_13, slt(add(not(0x03), calldatasize), 0x60))
      calldataload(0x04)
      0xffffffffffffffff
      dup2
      gt
      tag_13
      jumpi
      tag_12
      swap1
      calldatasize
      swap1
      0x04
      add
      tag_1
      jump	// in
    tag_12:
      pop
      pop
      calldataload(0x24)
      swap1
      0xffffffffffffffff
      dup3
      gt
      tag_13
      jumpi
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":433:435  81 */
      0x51
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
      tag_15
      0x20
      swap4
      calldatasize
      swap1
      0x04
      add
      tag_1
      jump	// in
    tag_15:
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":417:435  proof.length == 81 */
      swap1
      pop
      eq
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":417:454  proof.length == 81 && randomWord != 0 */
      dup1
      tag_16
      jumpi
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
    tag_17:
      iszero
      iszero
      dup2
      mstore
      return
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":417:454  proof.length == 81 && randomWord != 0 */
    tag_16:
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
      pop
      calldataload(0x44)
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":439:454  randomWord != 0 */
      iszero
      iszero
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":417:454  proof.length == 81 && randomWord != 0 */
      jump(tag_17)
        /* "contracts/ecvrf/NaiveECVRFVerifier.sol":245:463  contract NaiveECVRFVerifier is IECVRFVerifier {... */
    tag_13:
      0x00
      dup1
      revert
    tag_1:
      swap2
      dup2
      0x1f
      dup5
      add
      slt
      iszero
      tag_13
      jumpi
      dup3
      calldataload
      swap2
      0xffffffffffffffff
      dup4
      gt
      tag_13
      jumpi
      0x20
      dup4
      dup2
      dup7
      add
      swap6
      add
      add
      gt
      tag_13
      jumpi
      jump	// out

    auxdata: 0xa26469706673582212207de5df47e89aef5c6cee2367edec6c3ab93e9943e709e87ec9261db2444dc25864736f6c634300081a0033
}
